meaning: n.甲板,舰板,覆盖物,一副(纸牌)vt.装饰,修饰,打扮,装甲板
examples: I was hurled bodily to the deck.
We lay sunning ourselves on the deck.
My cabin is on deck C.
Plus, the Top of the Rock Observation Deck features a live music series in February.
This ultra-exclusive quayside hotel is all standalone bathtubs, spotlit deck beds, varnished wooden floors and swish private lounges.
